en: Face or Countenance Of ALLAH, Remembrance

bn: হে মূসা! সে ছিল বিশেষভাবে মনোনীত রসূল ও নবী।

en: Man, sorted out into three classes
Resurrection Day, Deniers of Resurrection Day
Scriptures, people of the (Jews and Christians)

en: False gods, idols and so-called partners besides ALLAH
Solomon, and the Queen of Saba
Moses, to the junction of the two seas
Moses, and calf-worship of his people

Partner, Partners of ALLAH, a falsehood

Trumpet on the Day of Resurrection
Disease in the hearts of hypocrites and disbelievers

bn: ইস্রায়েল, বনী-ইসরাঈলের সীমা ছাড়িয়ে গেছে, বিভিন্ন দল এ বিভক্ত হয়েছে , বানরে পরিণত হয়েছে
en: Israel, Children of Israel exceeded the limits, broken into various groups, monkeys

Moses, guided to the Right Path
Israel, Bestowed favour on Children of Israel

en: Moses, his childhood, mother and sister

bn: Paradise, Hurs, chaste females with wide and beautiful eyes, as if preserved egg
en: Paradise, Hurs, chaste females with wide and beautiful eyes, as if preserved egg

bn: নবিগন, মানুষের চেয়ে বেশি কিছু  না
en: Messengers, no more than human beings

bn: আপনারা অপেক্ষা করুন, আমরাও অপেক্ষা করছি

en: She-camel as a clear sign to Thamud people

bn: আল্লাহর রহমত থেকে নিরাশ হবেন না
en: Despair not of the Mercy of ALLAH (see also Jonah)
Free will, limited by ALLAH's Will

bn: ইস্রায়েল, বনী ইস্রায়েলরা রাজার কাছে প্রার্থনা করছে

bn: জান্নাত, উদ্যান এবং জলের ঝর্ণার মাঝে থাকবে

en: Resurrection Day, Record given behind back

en: Muhammad, only follow that which is revealed

bn: সাক্ষী হিসাবে প্রেরিত মুহাম্মদ(সাঃ), সুসংবাদদাতা ও সতর্ককারী হিসাবে
en: Muhammad, sent as a witness, bearer of glad tidings and a warner

bn: প্রত্যেক জাতির তার নির্ধারিত মেয়াদ রয়েছে, কেউই এটিকে প্রত্যাশা করতে বা বিলম্ব করতে পারে না
en: Every nation has its appointed term, none can anticipate nor delay it
Resurrection Day, Mountains will move away
Limits, These are the Limits set by ALLAH
Illegal sexual intercourse; evidence Of witnesses
Messengers, sent as givers of glad tidings and warners

en: Israel, Israel given Scripture and leaders

bn: স্বর্গ, খাঁটি সিলযুক্ত ওয়াইন, সাদা, সুস্বাদু
en: Paradise, pure sealed wine, white, delicious

en: Quran, made into parts, and revealed in stages

Sin, They may hide sins from men, but cannot hide from ALLAH

Spend, which is beyond your needs

The term of suckling of foster mother

Wives, are a tilth for you

Creation, of night and day, sun and moon

Decree, of every matter is from ALLAH

False conversation about Verses of Qur'an
Fighting, against those who believe not in ALLAH
Food, No sin for what ate in the past

Jews, enmity to the believers, Muslims
Kaaba, going round in naked state
Killing, If anyone killed a person he killed all mankind
Knowledge, Not a leaf falls, but He knows it

Life, Sell the Life of this world, for the Hereafter
Light, given by ALLAH, that the Believers may walk straight

Man, Fashioned perfectly and given due proportion

Man, created of the best stature (moulds)

Man, not two hearts inside his body

Never did We destroy a town, but there was a known decree for it

Repentance, have no effect if evil deeds are continued
